scripts.test: node -e "console.log('app-e2e Playwright suite is opt-in; run pnpm test:e2e')"
scripts.e2e: cross-env DEBUG= ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation playwright test
scripts.test:auth: cross-env DEBUG= ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation playwright test --project=auth-flows
scripts.test:orbit-case: cross-env DEBUG= ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation playwright test --project=authenticated --grep @orbit-case
scripts.test:orbit-case:blob: cross-env DEBUG= ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation playwright test --project=authenticated-blob --grep @blob
scripts.test:ui: cross-env DEBUG= ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation playwright test --ui
